steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that the two figures met "while performing in a 1960 touring production of Lorraine Hansberry's play A Raisin in the Sun." The correct choice must match this account exactly.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: swaps in the wrong play. ✗
  • Choice B: invents a specific role for one of the figures that the passage does not describe. ✗
  • Choice C: misdates the meeting to an era when the NEC did not yet exist. ✗
  • Choice D — 1960 touring production of A Raisin in the Sun: directly mirrors the passage's account of how and when they met. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
